Business Interpretation: Snack products are driven heavily by taste, texture, and perceived health/value balance.
Recommendation: Focus on optimizing flavor profiles and highlight health/value positioning in snack marketing.

Business Interpretation: Tea satisfaction depends on flavor strength, aroma consistency, and proper brewing expectations.
Recommendation: Provide clearer brewing instructions and ensure flavor consistency across batches.

Business Interpretation: Chocolate and sweet snacks are judged on richness, sweetness balance, and texture quality.
Recommendation: Refine sweetness levels and improve texture consistency for chocolate products.

Business Interpretation: Mixed reviews often stem from mismatched expectations around product quality and perceived value.
Recommendation: Align pricing with perceived value and improve product descriptions to set accurate expectations.

Business Interpretation: Specialty dietary products must meet both taste expectations and strict ingredient requirements.
Recommendation: Ensure ingredient transparency and improve flavor quality in specialty diet products.

Business Interpretation: Logistics issues (shipping delays, damage, incorrect items) strongly impact customer satisfaction independent of product quality.
Recommendation: Improve packaging durability, shipping speed, and accuracy of product fulfillment.

Business Interpretation: Dog product success is highly dependent on pet acceptance, digestibility, and perceived safety.
Recommendation: Increase product testing for palatability and safety across a wide range of dogs.

Business Interpretation: Cat food performance is closely tied to health outcomes, ingredient trust, and pet preference.
Recommendation: Prioritize high-quality ingredients and communicate health benefits clearly for cat products.

Business Interpretation: Coffee reviews are highly sensitive to strength, freshness, roast profile, and brewing compatibility.
Recommendation: Optimize roast consistency and clearly communicate strength/flavor expectations.

Business Interpretation: General dissatisfaction is often driven by unnatural taste, weak flavor, or off-putting texture.
Recommendation: Reformulate products with poor taste feedback and ensure natural, appealing flavor profiles.
